title: Delicious Sweet Dosa
description: A sweet twist on the classic Indian dosa, perfect for breakfast or as a snack. The pillowy texture of this dosa is achieved by the fermented batter.
instructions: Soak the rice in water for 4-5 hours.
Grind the soaked rice into a smooth batter.
Mix in the fermented pillowy dosa batter and sweet.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour a ladle of the dosa batter onto the pan and spread it evenly.
Cook for 1-2 minutes or until the edges start to curl.
Flip the dosa and cook for another minute.
Repeat with the remaining batter to make more dosas.
Serve the sweet dosas hot with your favorite chutney or sambar.
